description: Model a hazardous waste treatment loop in openLCA. Create a waste flow named 'Hazardous Sludge' (Flow type: Waste, Reference flow property: Mass). Create a generator process named 'Chemical Plant Operation' that produces this waste as an output and a treatment process named 'Sludge Incineration Service' that accepts it as an input. In the treatment process, set the 'Hazardous Sludge' input as the Quantitative Reference. Create a product system named 'Plant_Waste_System' that links the generator to the treatment service with a valid connection.
